title: Trimworks
description: Datapack with cheaper Smithing Template duplication recipe and reusable Templates for more accessible Armour Trims!
body:
# Choco's Trimworks!

For some odd reason, Mojang expects that Smithing Template's replication should serve as a heavy Diamond sink, despite the sole purpose of Armour Trimming being purely cosmetic (for Player expression via Armour customization).

This datapack rectifies that unreasonable notion by modifying Smithing Template's duplication cost to be appropriately sustainable and considerably cheaper, and introducing Template durability (Chips, Cracks, Crumbles after each use). Players can now utilise a single Template for trimming an entire Armour set!

### Planned Features
- unique sprites for respective trimmed Armours (resourcepack)
- Trims applying to more Equipment (Elytra, Horse Armour, etc.)
- more Materials for inlaying Trims (Echo Shard, Prismarine Crystal, etc.)
- removing Armour Trims via Grindstone interaction or Blank Template smithing recipe

### Credits
- Thank you [Deesaster](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/deesaster/) for creating [Consistent Netherite Upgrade](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/consistent-netherite-upgrade/)! Go visit her Content Gallery, she draws really awesome art!
- Thank you [Amaro_Lunático](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/amaro_lunatico/) for creating Trimwork's Pack Icon! Visit Amaro's [Projects Page](https://modrinth.com/user/Amaro_Lunatico) for excellent quality-of-life resourcepacks!
- Thank you [Simplexity](https://github.com/Simplexity-Development) for helping me package resourcepack assets! Visit their [Modrinth Profile](https://modrinth.com/organization/simplexity) for simple Vanilla+ projects!
- Thank you [Chisette](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/chisette/) for creating [Chiss' Consistent Templates](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/chiss-consistent-templates/)! Visit their [Twitter Account](https://x.com/ChisetteArt), they create amazing Blockbench models!

### Other Resources
Visit [Choco's Trimworks](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/trimworks/) in PlanetMinecraft for reporting issues or discussions/recommendation/suggestions for the pack. Refer gallery and changelogs for the complete list of features changed/added.

### NOTE
Feel free to tailor this datapack for your personal preference, as long as you credit me and respective collaborators accordingly! However, you may not redistribute any of the assets, either commercially or otherwise, without obtaining prior permission first.
